title: perideridia neurophylla
intro: Perideridia neurophylla, also known as Fraser's meadowfoam or Oregon meadowfoam, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Perideridia neurophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
